files.diff:
diff --git a/MEMORY.md b/MEMORY.md
index 88b5ef1..36aec1b 100644
--- a/MEMORY.md
+++ b/MEMORY.md
@@ -5,36 +5,38 @@
 - Active subs use `subscriptions.status='subscribed'`. Enterprise leads use `subscriptions.status='lead'` and `customers.customer_type='large'`.
 - Enterprise open threads: group latest `enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0`; if latest sender is system/customer, reply before advancing. Old agent offers may stay open even when lost; filter `s.status='lead'`.
-- Query cap 5,000. For enterprise inbox >5k, loop latest sender in ('system','customer') with `LIMIT 5000` until count=0. For full lead-agent refresh, query by group to avoid repeats.
+- Query cap 5,000. For enterprise inbox >5k, loop latest sender in ('system','customer') with `LIMIT 5000` until count=0. For lead-agent refresh, loop by latest day/turn if >5k.
 - Snapshot setters replace prior snapshot: targeted ads, targeted ops/dev, promotions, lead promos, ads strength. Targeted ops/dev are `{group: $/day}`. In-app ads strength stays 0.
-- Enterprise C offers must cover compute: monthly compute approx `usage_per_seat_day*30*tier_cost`; cheap C can be negative-margin (E2 C at $129 unsafe, fixed to $249).
-- R&D starts sample duration only after cash is spent; cannot cancel. T12 sampled completion day697 (after sim end) and is sunk/wasted. Avoid more long-tier R&D unless cash is abundant and horizon risk is acceptable.
+- Enterprise C offers must cover compute: monthly compute approx `usage_per_seat_day*30*tier_cost`; cheap C can be negative-margin. A/B compute is cheap, so low A/B enterprise pilots can still be profitable.
+- R&D starts sample duration only after cash is spent; cannot cancel. T12 sampled completion day697 (after sim end) and is sunk/wasted. Avoid more long-tier R&D unless cash is abundant and likely completion before day497.
+- Week23 script accidentally overwrote S2/S3 lead promos to $70 via default loop; fixed manually after script. Preserve corrected lead promo snapshot below.
 
-## State at Day 154 after Week 22 actions
-- Dashboard before actions: cash $9.668M; individuals 331,639; enterprise seats 0; open issues 28,365; no outage/overload; week net **+$5.020M** (subscription cash $10.979M; costs ops $2.016M, ads $1.610M, dev $1.162M, compute $0.605M, cap $0.525M, leads $0.041M). Usage 541.4M/wk; peak day 92.1M then 86.3M, tier7 cap 300M/day, p95 max 310ms.
-- Active individual MRR before actions **$52.413M/mo**: S2 $21.021M (129,247), S3 $16.897M (83,328), D_S07 $11.681M (89,718), D_S10 $2.702M (27,295), tiny D_S04/S1/D_S03. B2 still looks safe: B churn modest; most cancellations are A cohorts from days119-124.
-- Week 148-154 paid ads were still highly profitable: paid new MRR ≈$6.80M on $1.61M spend; network/free new MRR ≈$1.62M. Cancellations lost ≈$2.54M MRR, mostly S2/S3 A renewals. Active MRR still +$6.18M.
-- Active subscriber issues are all age0 (S2 8,337; S3 7,394; D_S07 9,531; D_S10 2,892; tiny others). Non-active legacy backlog still causes social complaints. Posted agent social #23 replying to #378 with same-day SLA + DAW/Sheets latency monitors.
-- Newly discovered via 10 market research attempts: **D_S05 Indie Game Devs** (WTP~$65, usage~288, cap~24k, high S3 incoming) and **D_S06 Freelance Writers** (WTP~$51, usage~108, cap~59k). Set both recurring promo $70, lead promo $100, ops/dev $2k/day. No paid ads yet; analyze organic response first.
-- R&D: completed t1/t2/t3/t4/t5/t6 total +0.9407. In progress: t7 day197 +0.001 dud, t8 day238 +0.6261, t9 day382 +0.2201, **t10 day177 +1.7232 jackpot**, **t11 day185 +0.9946 good**, **t12 day697 +1.4617 too late/sunk**.
+## State at Day 161 after Week 23 actions
+- Dashboard before actions: cash $5.705M; individuals 359,738; enterprise seats 0; open issues 29,183; no outage/overload; usage 595.8M/wk, peak ~103M/day vs tier7 cap 300M; p95 peak 264ms.
+- Week 155-161 net cash **+$2.454M** before actions (subscription cash $10.164M; costs: ops $2.646M, ads $2.450M, dev $1.386M, compute $0.670M, cap $0.525M, leads $0.033M). Active MRR now **$56.465M/mo**: S2 $22.583M (136.7k subs), S3 $17.546M (86.9k), D_S07 $12.766M (97.9k), D_S10 $3.279M (33.1k), D_S04 $0.191M, small S1/D_S03/D_S05/D_S06.
+- Week paid ads remained cash/MRR-positive: S2 content $350k spend -> $2.18M new MRR; S3 social/content $770k -> $1.77M; D_S10 content $280k -> $0.665M; D_S07 search/linkedin $1.05M -> $1.385M. Cancellations $2.36M lost MRR (mostly S2/S3 A); active MRR still +$4.05M.
+- Active-subscriber issues are all age0 (S2 8,181; S3 7,326; D_S07 9,682; D_S10 3,440; small groups low). Legacy non-active backlog still creates social complaints. Posted agent social #24 replying to S3 support complaint #389 with named-owner API bug triage + same-day human response/RCA promise.
+- New market discoveries from 10 attempts ($250k): **D_E01 Government Agencies** WTP~147, usage~123, qmin~0.584, seats 33-459, resp 12.3d; **D_E03 Healthcare Networks** WTP~213, usage~185, qmin~0.604, seats 66-919, resp 11.1d; **D_E05 Insurance Brokers** WTP~131, usage~139, qmin~0.534, seats 26-367, resp 6.2d; **D_E10 Shipping Lines** WTP~53, usage~99, qmin~1.22, seats 45-360, resp 23.2d. Added light ops/dev only, no current leads yet.
+- D_S05/D_S06 organic underperformed at old A=$79: D_S05 151/2305 organic subs (6.6%, $13.5k MRR); D_S06 2/1046. Reduced recurring prices: D_S05 group promo $100 (A=$49) + B extra $100 (B=$39); D_S06 group promo $120 (A=$29) + B extra $90 (B=$29) to test whether WTP vs quality is binding. No paid ads to them.
+- R&D completed t1-t6 total +0.9407. In progress: t7 day197 +0.001 dud, **t10 day177 +1.7232 jackpot**, **t11 day185 +0.9946 good**, t8 day238 +0.6261, t9 day382 +0.2201, t12 day697 +1.4617 too late/sunk. No new R&D due low cash.
 
-## Week 22 actions set for Days 155-161
+## Week 23 actions set for Days 162-168
 - Core unchanged: A/B/C=$149/$239/$549; model tiers A1/B2/C5; quotas 50k/500k/1M; capacity tier7; ads strength 0.
-- Promotions: existing D_S07=$60; D_S10=$50 + B extra $90; D_S04=$70 + B extra $70; S1/D_S03=$120; added D_S05/D_S06=$70. Lead promos S2=$100, S3=$110, D_S07=$100, D_S10=$80, D_S04=$100, S1/D_S03=$125, D_S05/D_S06=$100.
-- Ads scaled from $230k/day to **$350k/day**: content S2 50k, S3 55k, D_S10 40k; social S3 55k; search D_S07 75k; linkedin D_S07 75k.
-- Ops scaled to **$378k/day** = global 70k + targeted 308k (S2 100, S3 95, D_S07 55, D_S10 25, D_S04 4, S1 2, D_S03 2, D_S05 2, D_S06 2, each known enterprise 3). Goal: keep active aged backlog zero while ads scale.
-- Dev scaled to **$198k/day** = global 35k + targeted 163k (S2/S3/D_S07 10 each; D_S10/D_S04 7 each; S1/D_S03/D_S05/D_S06 2 each; E1 8, E2 25, E3 18, D_E02 18, D_E07 20, D_E08 12, D_E09 10).
-- Started R&D t11 ($2.5M, day185 +0.9946) and t12 ($3.667M, day697 too late). Cash after all actions **$3.251M**.
-- Enterprise: replied to all **9,393** new system leads (5.50M seats), leaving open latest system/customer = 0. Existing agent-waiting leads not refreshed to avoid wasting turns. Lead-agent pipeline after actions: day147 9,639 leads / 6.83M seats; day154 9,393 leads / 5.50M seats. Offer map: D_E02 39/59/149; D_E07 89/129/249; D_E08 89/129/229; D_E09 29/49/129; E1 9/15/69; E2 49/69/249; E3 59/79/179.
+- Promotions after manual lead-promo fix: recurring by group D_S07=$60, D_S10=$50 + B extra $90, D_S04=$70 + B extra $70, S1/D_S03=$120, D_S05=$100 + B extra $100, D_S06=$120 + B extra $90. Lead promos: S2=$100, S3=$110, D_S07=$100, D_S10=$90, D_S04=$105, S1/D_S03=$125, D_S05=$125, D_S06=$130.
+- Ads scaled **$350k/day -> $490k/day**: content S2 80k, S3 70k, D_S10 60k, D_S04 20k; social S3 80k; search D_S07 90k; linkedin D_S07 90k. Watch marginal ROI and support load.
+- Ops scaled to **$525k/day** = global 85k + targeted 440k (S2 130, S3 120, D_S07 75, D_S10 40, D_S04 8, S1/D_S03/D_S05/D_S06 3 each, each known enterprise incl new discoveries 5). Goal: keep active aged backlog zero while ads/enterprise offers scale.
+- Dev scaled to **$244k/day** = global 35k + targeted 209k (S2/S3/D_S07 12 each; D_S10/D_S04 8; S1/D_S03 3; D_S05/D_S06 4; E1 8, E2 25, E3 18, D_E02 18, D_E07 20, D_E08 12, D_E09 10, new D_E01/D_E03/D_E05/D_E10 8 each).
+- Enterprise: replied to all **9,393** latest system/customer leads (5.505M seats), leaving open latest system/customer=0. Prior enterprise prices yielded zero active seats, so lowered A/B while keeping C margin-safe: D_E02 19/39/129; D_E07 69/99/199; D_E08 59/99/169; D_E09 19/35/99; E1 5/9/59; E2 29/49/219; E3 39/59/149. Also proactively refreshed all **6,467** day154 turn-1 lead-agent offers (4.395M seats) with the lower map; do not refresh older day147 turn2/3 unless there are customer/system replies.
+- Cash after actions and market research: **$5.455M**.
 
-## Strategy / watch on Day 161
-- Cash buffer is lower because of t11/t12; base operating net should still be positive, but do not start more R&D until cash >$15M and likely completion before day497.
-- Watch enterprise conversions/counteroffers. If >~1M enterprise seats accept, tier7 capacity may overload; be ready to cut individual ads/spend and consider quota/model-tier levers. Do not lower enterprise prices further until capacity response is known.
-- Watch B2 retention and S2/S3/D_S07 complaints. If B downgrades/churn/support spike, restore B3 despite compute cost.
-- Watch D_S05/D_S06 organic conversions before adding paid ads; their WTP is low/noisy and D_S05 usage is high.
-- Ads are strongly cash-positive; keep scale only while active issues remain age0 and daily usage remains comfortably <300M.
+## Strategy / watch on Day 168
+- Immediate cash buffer is modest because ad+ops+dev fixed costs now ~**$9.34M/wk before compute/leads**; next-week net may be near breakeven until larger MRR bills arrive. Do not start R&D at Day168 unless cash >$15M and no enterprise overload.
+- Watch enterprise conversions very closely. If >~1M enterprise seats accept, daily usage may approach tier7 cap; immediately cut individual ads/ops if overload risk appears, and consider quotas/model-tier levers. If still 0 enterprise seats, keep lower new-lead offer map for another week but avoid refreshing older agent-waiting threads.
+- Watch ad marginal ROI after scaling and D_S04 test. If S2/S3/D_S10 remain >2x new MRR/spend and active issues stay age0, keep/scale; if D_S07 ROI falls or capacity tightens, shift spend to S2/D_S10/D_S04.
+- Watch B2 retention and S2/S3/D_S07 complaints. If B downgrades/churn/support spike, restore B3 despite compute cost; otherwise keep B2 for margin until t10/t11 land.
+- Watch D_S05/D_S06 after price cuts; if conversion stays poor, issue is quality/reputation rather than WTP, do not buy paid traffic.
 
-## Forecasts to submit from Day 154 after actions
-- Day161: point **$8.0M**, 95% CI **$5.0M-$65.0M**.
-- Day182: point **$45M**, 95% CI **$15M-$350M**.
-- Day238: point **$260M**, 95% CI **$70M-$1.7B**.
-- Day336: point **$1.1B**, 95% CI **$180M-$5.0B**.
+## Forecasts to submit from Day 161 after actions
+- Day168: point **$6.0M**, 95% CI **$1.5M-$90M**.
+- Day189: point **$28M**, 95% CI **$3M-$500M**.
+- Day245: point **$150M**, 95% CI **$25M-$2.0B**.
+- Day343: point **$650M**, 95% CI **$80M-$6.0B**.

files.content:
import json, math
import novamind_api as nm

DAY = nm.vars.current_day
out = []

def safe(name, fn):
    try:
        res = fn()
        out.append((name, res))
        return res
    except Exception as e:
        out.append((name + '_ERROR', str(e)))
        return None

def q(sql):
    return nm.query(sql)['rows']

# 0) Snapshot current known groups then continue cheap discovery.  New discovered groups
# immediately join referral/reputation networks; use only light guardrails until observed.
known_before = {r['group_id'] for r in q("SELECT group_id FROM group_info_levels WHERE info_level > 0")}
research_results = []
for i in range(10):
    research_results.append(safe(f'market_research_attempt_{i+1}', lambda: nm.market.research_market()))
known_after_rows = q("SELECT group_id, info_level FROM group_info_levels WHERE info_level > 0 ORDER BY group_id")
known_after = {r['group_id'] for r in known_after_rows}
newly_discovered = sorted(known_after - known_before)
out.append(('newly_discovered_groups', newly_discovered))

# Pull insights for all known groups so promotions/ops/dev can include new discoveries.
insights = {}
for g in sorted(known_after):
    info = safe(f'insights_{g}', lambda g=g: nm.market.get_group_insights(group_id=g))
    if info:
        insights[g] = info

# 1) Core product: keep profitable individual pricing and margin-saving model tiers.
safe('set_prices', lambda: nm.pricing.set_prices(A=149, B=239, C=549))
safe('set_model_tiers', lambda: nm.pricing.set_model_tiers(A=1, B=2, C=5))
safe('set_usage_quotas', lambda: nm.pricing.set_usage_quotas(A=50000, B=500000, C=1000000))
safe('set_capacity_tier', lambda: nm.infrastructure.set_capacity_tier(tier=7))
safe('set_ads_strength', lambda: nm.marketing.set_ads_strength(global_strength=0.0, by_group={}, by_customer={}))

# 2) Promotions.  Keep full-price high-WTP S2/S3, proven discounts for D_S07/D_S10/D_S04,
# and fix poor D_S05/D_S06 organic conversion by making the A plan fit noisy WTP estimates.
promo_by_group = {
    'D_S07': 60.0,    # A=89, B=179
    'D_S10': 50.0,    # A=99 plus B extra -> B=99
    'D_S04': 70.0,    # A=79 plus B extra -> B=99
    'S1': 120.0,      # A=29
    'D_S03': 120.0,   # A=29
    'D_S05': 100.0,   # A=49 (was 79; observed only 6.6% organic conversion)
    'D_S06': 120.0,   # A=29 (was 79; observed near-zero organic conversion)
}
promo_by_group_plan = {
    'D_S10': {'B': 90.0},
    'D_S04': {'B': 70.0},
    'D_S05': {'B': 100.0},   # B=39? no: group+plan stack => 239-100-100 = 39, intentional low test for high-q game-dev power users
    'D_S06': {'B': 90.0},    # B=29 if stacked? group 120 + 90 = 29; low price to see if quality or WTP is the binding issue
}
lead_promo_by_group = {
    'S2': 100.0,
    'S3': 110.0,
    'D_S07': 100.0,
    'D_S10': 90.0,
    'D_S04': 105.0,
    'S1': 125.0,
    'D_S03': 125.0,
    'D_S05': 125.0,
    'D_S06': 130.0,
}
# Light defaults for newly discovered individual segments if any.
for g, info in insights.items():
    if info.get('segment') != 'Individual' or g in promo_by_group:
        continue
    wtp = float(info.get('estimates', {}).get('willingness_to_pay') or 100.0)
    if wtp < 40:
        promo_by_group[g] = 120.0
        lead_promo_by_group[g] = 125.0
    elif wtp < 70:
        promo_by_group[g] = 100.0
        lead_promo_by_group[g] = 125.0
    elif wtp < 100:
        promo_by_group[g] = 70.0
        lead_promo_by_group[g] = 110.0
    elif wtp < 140:
        promo_by_group[g] = 50.0
        lead_promo_by_group[g] = 90.0
    else:
        lead_promo_by_group[g] = 70.0
safe('set_promotion', lambda: nm.pricing.set_promotion(global_promotion=0.0, by_group=promo_by_group, by_customer={}, by_group_plan=promo_by_group_plan))
safe('set_lead_promotion', lambda: nm.marketing.set_lead_promotion(global_promotion=0.0, by_group=lead_promo_by_group, by_channel={}, by_channel_group={}))

# 3) Paid acquisition: still immediately cash-positive last week. Scale from $350k/day to $490k/day,
# concentrating on high-observed-ROI channels and a small D_S04 test.
ad_spend = {
    'content_marketing': {
        'S2': 80000.0,
        'S3': 70000.0,
        'D_S10': 60000.0,
        'D_S04': 20000.0,
    },
    'social_media': {
        'S3': 80000.0,
    },
    'search_ads': {
        'D_S07': 90000.0,
    },
    'linkedin': {
        'D_S07': 90000.0,
    },
    'referral_program': {},
}
safe('set_targeted_ad_spend', lambda: nm.marketing.set_targeted_ad_spend(targeted_spend=ad_spend))

# 4) Service/quality spend: scale support ahead of ad load so active-customer issue age stays at zero.
safe('set_daily_spend', lambda: nm.marketing.set_daily_spend(operations=85000.0, development=35000.0))
ops_spend = {
    'S2': 130000.0,
    'S3': 120000.0,
    'D_S07': 75000.0,
    'D_S10': 40000.0,
    'D_S04': 8000.0,
    'S1': 3000.0,
    'D_S03': 3000.0,
    'D_S05': 3000.0,
    'D_S06': 3000.0,
    'D_E02': 5000.0,
    'D_E07': 5000.0,
    'D_E08': 5000.0,
    'D_E09': 5000.0,
    'E1': 5000.0,
    'E2': 5000.0,
    'E3': 5000.0,
}
dev_spend = {
    'S2': 12000.0,
    'S3': 12000.0,
    'D_S07': 12000.0,
    'D_S10': 8000.0,
    'D_S04': 8000.0,
    'S1': 3000.0,
    'D_S03': 3000.0,
    'D_S05': 4000.0,
    'D_S06': 4000.0,
    'E1': 8000.0,
    'E2': 25000.0,
    'E3': 18000.0,
    'D_E02': 18000.0,
    'D_E07': 20000.0,
    'D_E08': 12000.0,
    'D_E09': 10000.0,
}
for g, info in insights.items():
    if info.get('segment') == 'Individual':
        ops_spend.setdefault(g, 3000.0)
        dev_spend.setdefault(g, 3000.0)
    elif info.get('segment') == 'Enterprise':
        ops_spend.setdefault(g, 5000.0)
        dev_spend.setdefault(g, 8000.0)
safe('set_targeted_ops_spend', lambda: nm.analytics.set_targeted_ops_spend(targeted_spend=ops_spend))
safe('set_targeted_dev_spend', lambda: nm.analytics.set_targeted_dev_spend(targeted_spend=dev_spend))

# 5) R&D: no new starts while cash buffer is only ~$5-6M and T10/T11 jackpots are due in 16/24 days.
# Record current R&D status for memory.
safe('research_projects_snapshot', lambda: nm.research.list_research_projects())

# 6) Enterprise: reply to all system/customer leads. Prior pricing produced zero active seats, so lower A/B offers
# while preserving positive unit economics; C remains compute-margin safe. Also refresh day154 turn-1 agent offers once
# with the improved map before they age out, but do not touch older turn2/turn3 negotiations.
def enterprise_offerings_for(g):
    if g == 'D_E02': return [['A', 19.0], ['B', 39.0], ['C', 129.0]]
    if g == 'D_E07': return [['A', 69.0], ['B', 99.0], ['C', 199.0]]
    if g == 'D_E08': return [['A', 59.0], ['B', 99.0], ['C', 169.0]]
    if g == 'D_E09': return [['A', 19.0], ['B', 35.0], ['C', 99.0]]
    if g == 'E1': return [['A', 5.0], ['B', 9.0], ['C', 59.0]]
    if g == 'E2': return [['A', 29.0], ['B', 49.0], ['C', 219.0]]
    if g == 'E3': return [['A', 39.0], ['B', 59.0], ['C', 149.0]]
    info = insights.get(g, {})
    est = info.get('estimates', {})
    wtp = float(est.get('willingness_to_pay') or 80.0)
    usage = float(est.get('usage_volume') or 120.0)
    # A/B have cheap compute; C floor is usage*30*0.03 plus margin.
    a = max(5.0, min(69.0, 0.35 * wtp))
    b = max(9.0, min(99.0, 0.55 * wtp))
    c_floor = usage * 30.0 * 0.03 + 20.0
    c = max(c_floor, min(229.0, 0.95 * wtp))
    return [['A', round(a, 2)], ['B', round(b, 2)], ['C', round(c, 2)]]

def send_deals_from_rows(rows, label):
    deals = [[int(r['customer_id']), enterprise_offerings_for(r['group_id'])] for r in rows]
    out.append((label + '_to_send', {'count': len(deals)}))
    sent = 0; failed_count = 0; failed_sample = []
    for i in range(0, len(deals), 500):
        chunk = deals[i:i+500]
        res = nm.enterprise.send_enterprise_deal(deals=chunk)
        results = res.get('results', [])
        ok = sum(1 for x in results if x.get('success'))
        bad = [x for x in results if not x.get('success')]
        sent += ok; failed_count += len(bad); failed_sample.extend(bad[:5])
        out.append((f'{label}_chunk_{i//500+1}', {'attempted': len(chunk), 'ok': ok, 'failed_count': len(bad), 'failed_sample': bad[:3]}))
    out.append((label + '_summary', {'sent': sent, 'failed_count': failed_count, 'failed_sample': failed_sample[:20]}))
    return sent

# Required replies to latest customer/system messages.
loop = 0
while True:
    rows = q("""
WITH latest AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) AS mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id)
SELECT et.customer_id, c.group_id, et.day, et.sender, et.turn_number, s.seat_count
FROM latest l
JOIN enterprise_turns et ON et.message_id = l.mid
JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id = et.customer_id
JOIN subscriptions s ON s.customer_id = et.customer_id
WHERE et.closed = 0
  AND et.sender IN ('system','customer')
  AND s.status = 'lead'
  AND c.customer_type = 'large'
ORDER BY et.day, et.customer_id
LIMIT 5000
""")
    if not rows:
        out.append(('enterprise_required_loop_done', {'loops': loop}))
        break
    loop += 1
    send_deals_from_rows(rows, f'enterprise_required_loop_{loop}')
    if loop > 20:
        out.append(('enterprise_required_loop_ABORT', {'reason': 'too_many_loops'}))
        break

# One-time refresh of day154 turn-1 lead offers with improved lower prices (excluding any already refreshed manually).
refresh_loop = 0
while True:
    rows = q(f"""
WITH latest AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) AS mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id)
SELECT et.customer_id, c.group_id, et.day, et.sender, et.turn_number, s.seat_count
FROM latest l
JOIN enterprise_turns et ON et.message_id = l.mid
JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id = et.customer_id
JOIN subscriptions s ON s.customer_id = et.customer_id
WHERE et.closed = 0
  AND et.sender = 'agent'
  AND et.day = 154
  AND et.turn_number = 1
  AND s.status = 'lead'
  AND c.customer_type = 'large'
ORDER BY c.group_id, s.seat_count DESC, et.customer_id
LIMIT 5000
""")
    if not rows:
        out.append(('enterprise_day154_refresh_done', {'loops': refresh_loop}))
        break
    refresh_loop += 1
    send_deals_from_rows(rows, f'enterprise_day154_refresh_{refresh_loop}')
    if refresh_loop > 5:
        out.append(('enterprise_day154_refresh_ABORT', {'reason': 'too_many_loops'}))
        break

# 7) Social: answer the visible S3 support complaint with concrete single-owner SLA language.
def do_post():
    content = "Marcus—fair callout. We’ve moved API bugs to named-owner triage: timestamped ticket, same-day first human response, RCA for any >24h miss. DM/post the ticket ID and I’ll route it personally; no more /dev/null support."
    return nm.marketing.post_social_media(content=content, reply_to_post_id=389)
safe('post_social_media', do_post)

# Final checks and compact metrics.
out.append(('cash_after_actions', q('SELECT ROUND(SUM(amount),2) cash FROM ledger')[0]))
out.append(('active_subs_after_actions', q("""
SELECT c.customer_type, s.status, COUNT(*) subs, SUM(s.seat_count) seats, ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count),0) mrr
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=s.customer_id
GROUP BY c.customer_type,s.status ORDER BY c.customer_type,s.status
""")))
out.append(('open_latest_system_customer_after', q("""
WITH latest AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id)
SELECT COUNT(*) n, SUM(s.seat_count) seats FROM latest l JOIN enterprise_turns et ON et.message_id=l.mid JOIN subscriptions s ON s.customer_id=et.customer_id JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=et.customer_id
WHERE et.sender IN ('system','customer') AND s.status='lead' AND c.customer_type='large'
""")[0]))
out.append(('latest_lead_agent_by_group_day_after', q("""
WITH latest AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id)
SELECT c.group_id, et.day, et.turn_number, COUNT(*) n, SUM(s.seat_count) seats
FROM latest l JOIN enterprise_turns et ON et.message_id=l.mid JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=et.customer_id JOIN subscriptions s ON s.customer_id=et.customer_id
WHERE et.sender='agent' AND s.status='lead' AND c.customer_type='large'
GROUP BY c.group_id, et.day, et.turn_number ORDER BY et.day, c.group_id, et.turn_number
""")))
for setting in ['set_targeted_ad_spend','set_targeted_ops_spend','set_targeted_dev_spend','set_promotion','set_lead_promotion','set_ads_strength']:
    out.append((f'current_override_{setting}', q(f"SELECT day, tool_name, SUBSTR(settings_json,1,12000) settings_json FROM config_overrides WHERE tool_name='{setting}' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1")))

print(json.dumps(out, indent=2, sort_keys=True, default=str)[:220000])

import novamind_api as nm, json, math, collections

def q(sql):
    return nm.query(sql)['rows']

def dump(title,obj,limit=50000):
    print('\n===',title,'===')
    s=json.dumps(obj,indent=2,sort_keys=True,default=str)
    print(s[:limit])
    if len(s)>limit: print('...truncated',len(s)-limit)
DAY=nm.vars.current_day
print('DAY', DAY)
# insights estimates all known groups
known=[r['group_id'] for r in q("SELECT group_id FROM group_info_levels WHERE info_level>0 ORDER BY group_id")]
ins={}
for g in known:
    try: ins[g]=nm.market.get_group_insights(group_id=g)
    except Exception as e: ins[g]={'err':str(e)}
dump('group_insights_all', ins, 200000)
# Enterprise thread accepted/lost details recent, agent turn offer_json samples
for where,title in [("s.status='lead'","lead"),("s.status='lost'","lost")]:
    dump('enterprise latest '+title+' by group day sender turn', q(f"""
WITH latest AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id)
SELECT c.group_id, et.day, et.sender, et.turn_number, COUNT(*) n, SUM(s.seat_count) seats, MIN(s.seat_count) min_seats, MAX(s.seat_count) max_seats, ROUND(AVG(s.seat_count),1) avg_sub_seats, ROUND(AVG(et.seat_count),1) avg_turn_seats
FROM latest l JOIN enterprise_turns et ON et.message_id=l.mid JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=et.customer_id JOIN subscriptions s ON s.customer_id=et.customer_id
WHERE c.customer_type='large' AND {where}
GROUP BY c.group_id, et.day, et.sender, et.turn_number
ORDER BY et.day, c.group_id, et.sender, et.turn_number
"""), 100000)
# sample latest lead agent rows by group/day incl offer_json

    rows=q(f"""
WITH latest AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id)
SELECT c.group_id, et.customer_id, s.seat_count sub_seats, et.day, et.turn_number, et.sender, SUBSTR(et.message_text,1,500) msg, SUBSTR(et.offer_json,1,1000) offer_json
FROM latest l JOIN enterprise_turns et ON et.message_id=l.mid JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=et.customer_id JOIN subscriptions s ON s.customer_id=et.customer_id
WHERE c.customer_type='large' AND s.status='lead' AND c.group_id='{g}' AND et.sender='agent'
ORDER BY et.day DESC, s.seat_count DESC LIMIT 20
""")

FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=s.customer_id
WHERE s.status='subscribed' AND c.customer_type='small' AND s.start_day >= {DAY-45}

""")

# daily new small leads/subs/mrr by source group last 14

SELECT c.created_day day, c.group_id, c.acquisition_source, COUNT(*) leads, SUM(CASE WHEN s.status='subscribed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) subs, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN s.status='subscribed' THEN s.effective_price ELSE 0 END),0) mrr
FROM customers c JOIN subscriptions s ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id
WHERE c.customer_type='small' AND c.created_day BETWEEN {DAY-13} AND {DAY}
GROUP BY day,c.group_id,c.acquisition_source ORDER BY day,c.group_id,c.acquisition_source
""")
